title: Sol API Reference
description: Astra example that renders a multi-level TypeScript-style API reference with auto-generated sidebar.
headSnippets: <meta property="og:description" content="Astra example that renders a multi-level TypeScript-style API reference with auto-generated sidebar.">

<style>:root{color-scheme:light dark}html[data-theme="dark"]{background:#0b1020;color:#e5e7eb}html[data-theme="light"]{background:#ffffff;color:#111827}body{font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,sans-serif;line-height:1.6}main h1{font-size:30px;margin:0 0 12px;letter-spacing:-0.01em}main h2{font-size:20px;margin-top:28px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(120,120,120,0.2);padding-bottom:4px}main h3{font-size:16px;margin-top:20px;opacity:0.9}main code{background:rgba(120,120,120,0.15);padding:1px 6px;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.9em;font-family:ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace}main pre code{background:transparent;padding:0}.symbol-list{list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;display:grid;gap:10px}.symbol-list li{padding:12px 16px;border:1px solid rgba(120,120,120,0.3);border-radius:8px}.symbol-list li:hover{border-color:rgba(79,70,229,0.6)}.symbol-list a{text-decoration:none;color:inherit;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;gap:16px}.symbol-list .name{font-family:ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;font-weight:600;color:#4f46e5}html[data-theme="dark"] .symbol-list .name{color:#a5b4fc}.symbol-list .blurb{font-size:13px;opacity:0.7}.module-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:12px;margin:24px 0}.module-grid a{display:block;padding:16px 18px;border:1px solid rgba(120,120,120,0.3);border-radius:10px;text-decoration:none;color:inherit}.module-grid a:hover{border-color:rgba(79,70,229,0.6)}.module-grid h3{margin:0 0 4px;font-size:16px;font-family:ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;color:#4f46e5}html[data-theme="dark"] .module-grid h3{color:#a5b4fc}.module-grid p{margin:0;font-size:13px;opacity:0.75}.sig{font-family:ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;font-size:14px;background:rgba(120,120,120,0.12);padding:10px 14px;border-radius:6px;display:block;white-space:pre-wrap}.crumbs{font-size:13px;opacity:0.65;margin-bottom:8px}.crumbs a{color:inherit}</style>
